title: notholirion koeiei
intro: Notholirion koeiei, also known as Koeie's Lilyturf or Koeie's Lilyturf Grass, is a type of plant species in the Asparagaceae family. It is an evergreen perennial with long, narrow leaves and small white flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with potential health benefits including relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the roots of Notholirion koeiei are often dried and used as a tea or tincture, while the leaves are sometimes used to make a poultice or topical treatment.
